subcodes.first_line: O thou who art always making mention of God! Guide people in the path of God like unto a lighted lamp.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی در سبیل الهی چون سراج نورانی هادی امم شو و چون ملائکه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness
